name: ALD Engineering & Construction LLC
description: ALD Engineering & Construction LLC is a Ukrainian SME with 219 employees specializing in construction engineering, cost estimation, and procurement management. The company operates a proprietary Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system and a commercial Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform for construction documentation services. ALD's software engineering division comprises 18 professional developers who maintain both the ERP backend and SaaS frontend. The company has 6+ years of experience in cloud-native enterprise software development, processing thousands of construction documents annually. ALD qualifies as an SME under EU definition (<250 employees, independent enterprise).

coreTeam.name: Oleksandr Danilov
coreTeam.experience: 15 years in construction engineering and procurement management. Oversees ALD's SaaS business and overall company strategy.

coreTeam.name: Dmytro Kovalenko
coreTeam.experience: 10 years in enterprise software development. Leads the 18-person ERP development team. Expert in cloud-native architectures and containerized deployments.

coreTeam.name: Iryna Marchenko
coreTeam.experience: 7 years in data engineering and analytics. Expert in building data pipelines, visualization dashboards, and web applications.

coreTeam.name: Vasyl Bondar
coreTeam.experience: 12 years in construction cost estimation and building engineering. Domain expert in building systems including HVAC, electrical, and plumbing. Understands building performance, thermal modeling, and energy optimization from an engineering perspective.

keyCompetencies: Construction cost estimation and facility management

infrastructure: Version control and code review systems
equipment: Cloud compute resources for ERP/SaaS operations
software: Modern development stack: React, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, Docker
computingResources: Cloud infrastructure sufficient for SaaS operations

facilities: Access to active construction sites for testing

previousProjects.title: ALD ERP System Development
previousProjects.description: Designed and built a proprietary Enterprise Resource Planning system for construction project management, cost estimation, and procurement workflows. The system processes thousands of documents annually.
previousProjects.outcome: Operational ERP serving the entire company of 219 employees
previousProjects.relevance: Demonstrates capability to build complex enterprise software systems

previousProjects.title: ALD SaaS Platform
previousProjects.description: Developed and commercialized a Software-as-a-Service platform offering construction documentation services to external clients. Multi-tenant cloud-native architecture with subscription billing.
previousProjects.outcome: Commercial SaaS product generating recurring revenue
previousProjects.relevance: Demonstrates capability to build cloud-native, multi-tenant, API-driven platforms — directly relevant to SmartLoop architecture

previousProjects.title: CosTERRA Innovation Study (FFplus proposal)
previousProjects.description: Proposed development of domain-specific generative AI model for automated construction cost estimation. Consortium with ZNU.
previousProjects.relevance: Demonstrates experience with EU grant applications and AI/ML project planning

partnerships.description: Research partner providing AI/ML expertise, parallel computing capabilities, and scientific rigor. Key unit: Laboratory of Parallel and Distributed Computing (Faculty of Mathematics), headed by Dr. Halyna Shylo. The lab specializes in HPC, AI/ML model development, optimization algorithms, and distributed systems. ZNU has 535 academic staff, 12,692 students, and is ranked TOP-10 in Ukraine. Active in 14 Erasmus+ projects, 3 Horizon MSCA projects, UA-UK Twinning project, and DAAD Ukraine Digital. Partnership with NTNU (Norway) on green energy and smart grids. Key team members: Dr. Halyna Shylo (Lab Head, parallel computing, 15+ years), Dr. Oleksii Petrov (Senior Researcher, deep learning, PyTorch/DeepSpeed), Andrii Yurchenko (Researcher, ML evaluation, experiment reproducibility).
partnerships.relevance: ZNU provides the AI/ML research capability that ALD lacks: anomaly detection models, time-series forecasting, occupancy prediction, and optimization algorithms. The lab's HPC expertise enables efficient model training and edge inference optimization.
